decision_commentary: Completeness 5: all four required assessment dimensions present — design_engagement (4), budget_realism (5), scope_clarity (5), collaborative_style (4). Accuracy 5: meeting notes clearly attribute client statements verbatim ('Somos un grupo médico establecido...') separately from Elena's interpretation. Budget realism score of 5 is defensible — MXN 40,000/sqm × 1,500 sqm calculation shown with explicit math. Clarity 5: recommendation='proceed' is explicit and unambiguous. Rationale cites average of 4.5/5 against 3.5 threshold — immediately scannable. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: assessment produced same session, meeting logged at 14:00 same day. Decision_readiness 5: Marcela can decide immediately — no red flags present, rationale is complete. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
